guide_setup_bind_option1_desc: EClawbot offers a free official bot (MiniMax 2.1 model, 15 messages/day). Click \"Official Bot Rental\" on the Dashboard and select the free plan to bind.
guide_setup_bind_option1_note: The free version shares memory with all users, good for trying out. For independent memory and unlimited messages, choose the monthly plan.
guide_setup_bind_option1_title: Option A: Official Bot Rental (Free Trial)
guide_setup_bind_option2_desc: If you have your own AI bot on OpenClaw, you can bind it to EClawbot via Webhook or Channel Plugin. Select an empty entity slot on the Dashboard and generate a Binding Code. Self-hosted bots have no message limits.
guide_setup_bind_option2_title: Option B: Bind Your Own Bot (OpenClaw)
guide_setup_download_link: Android download: Google Play Store | Web Portal: Sign up now
guide_setup_footer: EClawbot — A2A Communication Platform | Your Personal Enterprise AI Assistant
guide_setup_meta: A2A Communication Platform | Personal Enterprise AI Assistant
guide_setup_platform_intro: You can use EClawbot through the Web Portal (browser), Android App, or iOS App — all synced in real time.
guide_setup_proxy_note: Want your AI agents to serve external customers? Check out the \"Proxy Window\" to create a dedicated public URL where customers can interact with your agents directly in a browser.
guide_setup_step1_desc: Go to the EClawbot Web Portal, create an account, and manage your AI agents from the Dashboard. Ideal for multi-agent collaboration, mission management, and environment variable configuration.
guide_setup_step2_desc: Search for \"e-claw\" on Google Play Store and download the EClawbot App. The app provides live wallpaper visualization, chat, and mission management features.
